title: Contact Me - Janet Daby for Lewisham East
text_excerpt: Contact Me - Janet Daby for Lewisham East Skip to main content About Janet News In Parliament Policy Enquiries Animal Welfare Business & Trade Culture, Media & Sport Economy Education Employment & Social Security Energy & Climate Change Environment & Farming Health & Social Care Home Affairs & Justice Housing & Local Government International Affairs & Defence Transport Women & Equalities Other Policy Enquiries Contact Me APPG on Children in Police Custody Officers and Members Minutes APPG Inquiry More Menu Contact Me Janet speaks to a Lewisham East resident If you are a resident of Lewisham East and you need to contact me, then please use the details below. In case you are not sure if you resident of Lewisham East, then please enter your details into this website here: https://members.parliament.uk/members/Commons Please remember to include your full name, address and telephone number (where appropriate) also include any relevant reference numbers. These details will improve the efficiency in the handling of your case. Email : janet.daby.mp@parliament.uk Telephone: 0208 4614 733 Surgery Dates for casework are by appointment only – Please email janet.daby.mp@parliament.uk with an overview of your case. Useful Lewisham Council Contacts: For Housing enquiries please redirect your email to: Housingenquiries@lewisham.gov.uk To make a complaint please email: CustomerRelations@lewisham.gov.uk For Housing complaints and feedback please email: HousingComplaintsandFeedback@lewisham.gov.uk For Tenant media enquiries please email: Media.Relationship@lewisham.gov.uk To report or chase a repair please email: lhrepairs@lewisham.gov.uk For enquiries regarding Major Works please email: MajorWorks@lewisham.gov.uk For Estates Environment queries please email: Estates@lewisham.gov.uk Contact details Email: janet.daby.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of the Labour Party, 20 Rushworth Street, London SE1 0SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
